headings.text: Overview: How Does PolyJet 3D Printing Work?

meta_description: PolyJet 3D printing is an additive manufacturing process that sprays tiny droplets of photopolymer material onto a build platform and then immediately cures it with UV light, suitable for creating highly detailed parts with smooth surfaces.

sections.heading: Photopolymer Jetting (PolyJet) 3D printing service
sections.text: Photopolymer Jetting (PolyJet) 3D printing service Use PolyJet 3D printing technology to create multi-material, full-color, smooth-surface models in a single build. Get a quote

sections.heading: Overview: How Does PolyJet 3D Printing Work?
sections.text: Overview: How Does PolyJet 3D Printing Work? PolyJet 3D Printing Service PolyJet 3D printing is a powerful and versatile additive manufacturing technology that delivers high precision, smooth surface finishes, and the ability to produce multi-material and multi-color parts in a single build. Ideal for prototypes, functional models, and detailed parts, PolyJet excels in producing complex geometries and fine features with exceptional accuracy. How Does PolyJet 3D Printing Work? PolyJet 3D printing works by jetting tiny droplets of photopolymer materials onto a build platform, where they are immediately cured by UV light. This process is repeated layer by layer, allowing for the creation of hi...

sections.heading: Benefits of PolyJet 3D Printing
sections.text: Benefits of PolyJet 3D Printing Advantages High Precision Achieves layer thickness as fine as 16 microns, ensuring detailed and accurate prints. Multi-Material & Color Printing Combines multiple materials and colors in one build, allowing for complex designs. Smooth Surface Finish Produces parts with excellent surface quality, often eliminating the need for post-processing. Wide Material Selection Offers a broad range of materials, including rigid, flexible, transparent, and high-temperature options.

sections.heading: Applications of PolyJet 3D Printing
sections.text: Applications of PolyJet 3D Printing Prototyping Create highly detailed prototypes with accurate color representation and texture. Medical Models Produce detailed anatomical models with realistic textures and color differentiation. Consumer Products Design functional prototypes or end-use parts with various material properties. Art & Design Bring intricate designs to life with high precision and full-color capabilities. Get an 3D Printing quote

sections.heading: Our PolyJet 3D printing service
sections.text: Our PolyJet 3D printing service Requirement Specification Maximum build size 490mm x 390mm x 200mm Minimum build size 5 x 5 x 5 mm Minimum wall thickness 1.0 mm Dimensional accuracy L<100mm,±0.1mm. L＞100mm, ±0.2mm or 0.06%*L(mm) (Whichever is greater) The table below depicts the general tolerances for PolyJet services. Stresses during the build, support strategy and other geometry considerations may cause deviation in tolerances and flatness. Improved tolerances may be possible with a manual quote review, after successful completion of a prototype build, and must be approved on a case-by-case basis.

sections.heading: Surface Finish and Post-Processing Options
sections.text: Surface Finish and Post-Processing Options item note STANDARD Bead blast to remove all powder, which leaves a consistent overall texture. CUSTOM Secondary options include a primer or dye color that can be applied as well as taps and inserts.

sections.heading: Available Materials for PJ
sections.text: Available Materials for PJ Below is a list of our standard materials for PJ 3D printing. To instantly compare material prices, upload your parts to our online platform. PA12 Dark black (dyeing), white Nylon PA12 is the most common 3D printing material. It has good mechanical properties, electrical insulation, etc., and is widely used in pipes, housings, complex assemblies, connectors and other components. Glass fiber nylon(PA12+35% GF) Light gray, Dark black (dyeing) Glass fiber nylon is PA12 nylon mixed with 35% glass fiber. This material has higher strength and higher heat resistance than nylon material. TPU white, black TPU is called thermoplastic polyurethane elastomer rubber. It is a t...

sections.heading: PA12
sections.text: PA12 Dark black (dyeing), white Nylon PA12 is the most common 3D printing material. It has good mechanical properties, electrical insulation, etc., and is widely used in pipes, housings, complex assemblies, connectors and other components.

sections.heading: Glass fiber nylon(PA12+35% GF)
sections.text: Glass fiber nylon(PA12+35% GF) Light gray, Dark black (dyeing) Glass fiber nylon is PA12 nylon mixed with 35% glass fiber. This material has higher strength and higher heat resistance than nylon material.

sections.heading: TPU
sections.text: TPU white, black TPU is called thermoplastic polyurethane elastomer rubber. It is a type of polymer material between rubber and plastic.

sections.heading: Our CUSTOM surface finishes
sections.text: Our CUSTOM surface finishes Here is a list of standard surface finishes. For custom surface finishes such as electroplating or polishing, please contact 3dcnc@pcbway.com. Spray painting Get painted according to the color pattern provided by the customer (Including matte paint, high-gloss paint, electroplating-imitation paint, varnish, leather paint,etc). Polished The surface texture is polished in a variety of ways to meet the actual needs of customers. The transparent parts can be polished accordingly to improve transparency and light transmittance. Electroplating Provide electroplating services, improve the overall strength of the parts, provide metal-like surface texture, and make it hav...

sections.heading: Spray painting
sections.text: Spray painting Get painted according to the color pattern provided by the customer (Including matte paint, high-gloss paint, electroplating-imitation paint, varnish, leather paint,etc).

sections.heading: Polished
sections.text: Polished The surface texture is polished in a variety of ways to meet the actual needs of customers. The transparent parts can be polished accordingly to improve transparency and light transmittance.

sections.heading: Electroplating
sections.text: Electroplating Provide electroplating services, improve the overall strength of the parts, provide metal-like surface texture, and make it have certain metal characteristics.

sections.heading: Inlay nut
sections.text: Inlay nut At the specific bottom hole position that needs to be processed, the internal thread is processed.

sections.heading: Glazing assembly
sections.text: Glazing assembly The surface of the part is glazed to better imitate the appearance of handicrafts. Have mature assembly experience to ensure the overall display of the product.

sections.heading: Reinforced coating
sections.text: Reinforced coating The unique outer coating processing ability improves the strength of the product structure, reduces external wear, and can better avoid damage caused by normal storage and use.
